chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1394 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5351/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5352/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 23-09-2025 Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. SIP Ghulam Akbar Mirani, Investigating Officer Crime No.63 of 2025 under Section 365-B, 452, 342 PPC and 3 TIP Act, 2013 of Police Station, Daharki, is present and files statement, which is taken on record. He submits that after recording 164 Cr.PC statement of the alleged abductee Mst. Shah Naz before Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Daharki, the case has been challaned. He further submits that the alleged abductee in her statement has fully implicated the nominated accused persons including the present petitioner. Since the case has been challaned, in which the alleged abductee has supported the version as set-out in the FIR registered by one Lal Bux, brother of the alleged abductee. Under the circumstances, the instant Petition stands disposed of. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the trial Court concerned by filing application under Section 249-A or 265-K Cr.PC, as the case may be, for appropriate relief. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
